title: Citation/provenance tooling: citation-coverage + license-compatibility + staleness checks in CI
context: The editorial guardrail rubric's 'no statistic without a source' rule and the CC-BY-compatibility gate must be enforced mechanically in CI, not just in review. This task implements the provenance/citation tooling that (a) fails the build on any statistical assertion not keyed to a register entry, (b) fails the build on any embedded source whose ccByCompatible is false, and (c) flags any source past its reviewBy staleness date for refresh and re-sign-off. This tooling depends on the platform repo (oncology-data-literacy-platform-004) and the populated source register (oncology-data-literacy-sources-007).
objective: Implement the citation/provenance tooling in CI: (1) citation-coverage check that fails the build on any statistical assertion in course content not keyed to a source register entry; (2) license-compatibility check that fails the build on any embedded source whose ccByCompatible verdict is false; (3) staleness check that flags (or fails) on any source whose reviewBy date has passed, requiring refresh and re-sign-off before the statistic may be served. Wire all three into the existing CI pipeline from oncology-data-literacy-platform-004.
acceptanceCriteria: Citation-coverage check is wired into CI and fails the build on any statistical assertion in course content that is not keyed to a source register entry
License-compatibility check is wired into CI and fails the build on any embedded source whose ccByCompatible verdict is false in the register
Staleness check is wired into CI and flags (or optionally fails) any source past its reviewBy date, with a clear error message identifying the source and the refresh action required
All three checks pass on the pilot module (oncology-data-literacy-pilot-006) with its existing register entries
Maintainer-reviewed PR with all CI checks green before merge
output: A merged PR adding citation-coverage, license-compatibility, and staleness checks to CI — the mechanical enforcement of the 'no statistic without a source' and CC-BY-compatibility guardrails across all course content.
